title: viola sylvestris
intro: Viola sylvestris, also known as the woodland violet or early dog-violet, is a perennial flowering plant that belongs to the Violaceae family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral effects, as well as its ability to soothe digestive issues. The health benefits of Viola sylvestris include reducing symptoms of anxiety and stress, improving sleep quality, and providing relief from menstrual cramps and other women's health issues. Herbal preparations of Viola sylvestris include infusions, tinctures, and salves, which can be made from the plant's flowers, leaves, or roots.
